features.name: interface array member assignment to virtual interface
features.description: Code should include an interface array element assigned to a virtual interface variable

features.name: interface array member passed to class constructor
features.description: Code should include an interface array element passed as argument to a class constructor expecting virtual interface

features.name: virtual interface array in class assigned from interface array
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface array member assigned from a module-level interface array
